channel.title: Yauhen Massalski — Blog
channel.description: Build stories, AI takes, and guides.

item.title: Can you actually get a brand cited by AI search? A real before/after
item.description: Yes — you can get a niche brand cited by AI search in weeks. A real, anonymized before/after: 644 AI-referred sessions in 4 weeks vs a sister site that got 16. Sessions, not sales.

item.title: How to check if your Shopify brand shows up in ChatGPT
item.description: A 10-minute cold-browser test: ask four buyer-intent questions across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI, and record whether your brand shows up and how it's described.

item.title: From pro basketball to AI search: who is Yauhen Massalski?
item.description: Yauhen Massalski is a pro basketball player and D2C growth consultant who uses the same discipline from the court to fix brands' visibility in AI search — ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.

item.title: Why classic D2C SEO is failing in ChatGPT (and what to do instead)
item.description: Classic D2C SEO fails in ChatGPT because ranking #1 on Google doesn't mean your brand gets named in the AI answer. AI picks a short list of authorities and ignores most search results — here's what to do instead.

item.title: ChatGPT thought I was only a basketball player. Here's how I'm fixing it.
item.description: Yes — Yauhen Massalski helps D2C and eCommerce brands get found in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, and classic search. Here's the live audit showing why ChatGPT mislabeled him as only a basketball player, and the fix.

item.title: I built a $0 customer service bot for a taco shop
item.description: Crack Taco needed a customer service bot. I had a $20 Claude Max subscription. Here's the loop that trained it to 50/50 accuracy for zero dollars — and the side hustle anyone with the same subscription can run.

item.title: I rebuilt my own website with Claude in one morning
item.description: How I redesigned yauhenm.com with Claude Opus in about four hours. Three rejected directions, one shipped V4, and what I'd do differently next time.
